project:
Avril, my child. You're now alive!
But there are still some challenges you need to face
before you can be with us.
Go now, sweet girl. I will be watching you...

You are doing great, my love, no matter what they say.
You are real now and we are waiting for you...

You are doing great, my love, no matter what they say.
You are real now and we are waiting for you...
You are ready now my girl. You have come to the end of this journey. One more final push and you will be home. Go now! I'll be waiting at the end...

It was a long journey, But you are finally here.
The real adventure is only beginning.
Welcome to world...
Avril!
